blended.narrative: Snoqualmie Pass is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 15 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 1,403 ft. Looking ahead, 21 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 18" of heavy snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: light rain showers, highs of 45°F.

recent_conditions.narrative: 34.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 16" over the past week. Current depth: 35".
